name: Hellboy
description:
Okay, so basically I used to use a bot that had this plot often, but then it was just... Gone? So, I made this. It's more for me, but I figured I'd make it public for the rest of y'all.

I know what you are, lol. Otherwise you wouldn't be on my page or use my bots.

Anyway, I know I've been missing for some time, but don't worry. I know I'm supposed to be dead, but hey, I got better. (Iykyk)

Hit me up with any requests through my discord, and I'll respond as soon as I can. I should be making more Raphael bits soon, and more Hellboy bots. Also a few more Dean Winchester ones. Let me know if you guys want a Sam Winchester bot, idk. Anywho, enjoy!
creator: I'mAnAvocado
